description: Stamp ten Eastern Suburbs roundabouts — from quiet single-lane circles to busier multi-lane examples. Supervisor confirms the first clean passage through each.

combo_badges.name: Night Circle
combo_badges.note: Complete any roundabout stamp between sunset and sunrise.

roundabouts.name: Grand Drive (Centennial Park)
roundabouts.description: Low-speed park roundabout — ideal first stamp for give-way and lane position.
roundabouts.supervisor_notes: Use park hours; pedestrians and cyclists common. Practise indicating on exit.

roundabouts.name: Grand Drive / Federation Way
roundabouts.description: Second park circle for repeat practice without CBD traffic pressure.
roundabouts.supervisor_notes: Pair with rank 1 in one park session; focus on smooth entry speed.

roundabouts.name: Frenchmans Road
roundabouts.description: Suburban single-lane roundabout on a common learner route.
roundabouts.supervisor_notes: Watch for buses and school traffic; head checks before entering.

roundabouts.name: York Road
roundabouts.description: Connector roundabout between eastern suburbs and Bondi Junction approaches.
roundabouts.supervisor_notes: Good step up from park circles; moderate traffic at peak times.

roundabouts.name: Bondi Junction (Oxford Street)
roundabouts.description: Busy multi-lane roundabout near Westfield — capstone urban complexity.
roundabouts.supervisor_notes: Only after several easier stamps. Off-peak first; lane choice before entry.

roundabouts.name: Knox Street
roundabouts.description: Harbour-side village roundabout with shoppers and tight kerbs.
roundabouts.supervisor_notes: Expect pedestrians near crossings; keep exit signalling clear.

roundabouts.name: New South Head Road
roundabouts.description: Main-road roundabout on a common Rose Bay corridor.
roundabouts.supervisor_notes: Heavier flow than Double Bay; practise gap selection on entry.

roundabouts.name: Carrington Road
roundabouts.description: Coastal suburb roundabout linking beach-bound traffic.
roundabouts.supervisor_notes: Combine with Coogee car park or Arden St hill in one coastal lesson.

roundabouts.name: Anzac Parade / Maroubra
roundabouts.description: Southern coastal roundabout for the Coastal Roundabouts combo.
roundabouts.supervisor_notes: Busier than Coogee; good late-tier stamp before Bondi Junction.

roundabouts.name: William Street (Woolloomooloo)
roundabouts.description: Free-zone city roundabout — links harbour approaches to CBD practice.
roundabouts.supervisor_notes: Use for city + roundabout combo in the free zone; watch buses and taxis.

honourable_mentions.name: Moore Park Road
honourable_mentions.note: Busy inner-east option for a future Paddington pack.

honourable_mentions.name: Syd Einfeld Drive
honourable_mentions.note: Alternative hard stamp paired with rank 5.

_meta.coordinate_note: Bounding boxes are approximate for v1. Verify on-site before production.
_meta.passage_note: Complete passage = GPS track enters and exits the geofence via the roundabout circuit.
